title: What my family likes
objective: Hablar de gustos, actividades y características básicas de familiares usando presente simple y adjetivos sencillos.

activities.prompt: My brother loves meeting people. He is ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Friendly describe a una persona amable y sociable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el adjetivo relacionado con tratar bien a otras personas.

activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos likes en presente simple.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sister es tercera persona singular; añade s al verbo.

activities.feedback_correct: Parents es plural y usa la forma base enjoy.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con un sujeto plural no añadas s al verbo.

activities.instruction: Une el adjetivo con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces adjetivos básicos para describir personas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada palabra con la característica que describe.

activities.prompt: My cousin like reading and she play tennis.
activities.correct_answer: My cousin likes reading and she plays tennis.
activities.feedback_correct: Con cousin y she usamos likes y plays.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona singular en presente simple.

activities.prompt: My father is very funny. He likes telling stories, and he plays the guitar at family parties.
activities.question: What does the father like doing?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice he likes telling stories.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la actividad después de likes.

activities.prompt: My mother is kind. She likes gardening. My brother is funny. He plays the guitar.
evaluation_criteria: clear final s in likes and plays
activities.feedback_correct: Las descripciones y acciones se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca suavemente la s final de likes y plays sin separar el verbo.

activities.prompt: My grandmother is very kind and funny. She likes gardening and watching old movies. She does not like loud music.
activities.question: What does she not like?
activities.feedback_correct: La negación aparece antes de like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con does not like.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about three relatives. Include one adjective and one activity or preference for each person.
evaluation_criteria: present simple with correct third-person s
activities.feedback_correct: Describes personas y gustos con oraciones comprensibles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Comprueba la s de likes, plays, reads o watches con he/she.

activities.instruction: Presenta a tu familia a la IA.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI about three relatives. Describe their personalities and what they like or do. Ask the AI about its fictional family too.
success_criteria: uses likes and does not like
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes describir a tu familia más allá de los nombres y relaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ayuda a corregir el verbo y a elegir un adjetivo más preciso.
